creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 243790
kernel panic

On a -CURRENT from today I got this kernel panic directly after booting on a hyper-v virtual machine. It isn't possible to get a crash dump, so I only could upload a screenshot of the panic.

Last known booting kernel is from yesterday.

FreeBSD fbsd-dev.ttyv0.de 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT amd64 1400093 #26 main-n264442-c2cbd7ffa71a: Tue Aug  1 07:52:26 CEST 2023     root@lion.ttyv0.de:/boiler/nfs/obj/boiler/nfs/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-TCP amd64
